citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Feed-forward networks can learn arbitrary functions and are used for both classification and regression. 2D convolutional networks are used for image analysis. Recurrent networks are used for language processing. Generative adversarial networks are used to create deepfakes.
